title: lotus creticus subsp. cytisoides
intro: Lotus creticus subsp. cytisoides, also known as Cretan lotus or sea lotus, is a plant species belonging to the Nelumbo genus and is native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Lotus creticus subsp. cytisoides are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and protect against oxidative stress, among other benefits. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other health issues.
